properties.name: tmdb.access-token
properties.description: TMDB API read access token used for bearer authentication.

properties.name: tmdb.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the TMDB API.

properties.name: tmdb.default-language
properties.description: Default TMDB language tag, for example en-US or de-DE.

properties.name: tmdb.default-region
properties.description: Default TMDB region code, for example US or DE.

properties.name: tmdb.connect-timeout
properties.description: Connection timeout for TMDB HTTP requests.

properties.name: tmdb.request-timeout
properties.description: Request timeout for TMDB HTTP requests.

properties.name: management.health.tmdb.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable the TMDB Spring Boot Actuator health indicator.
